strategy: Post 30 minutes before peak EST window — algorithm distributes before the audience peak hits. US audience = highest CPM ($8-25 RPM on YouTube vs $1-3 in non-tier-1).

optimal_windows_est.reason: US commute scroll time. Shorts algorithm pushes overnight queue.
Post-work scroll peak. Highest engagement window for US audience.

youtube_shorts.cadence: 2 Shorts/day minimum per channel. 5 channels = 10 Shorts/day total.

long_form_schedule.length: 10–20 min compilation (builds watch hours for YPP)

optimal_windows_est.reason: US lunch scroll peak. Instagram Reels peak engagement midday EST.
After-dinner prime time. Highest save+share rates for Reels.

instagram_reels.cadence: 2 Reels/day per account. 5 accounts = 10 Reels/day total.
instagram_reels.manychat_rule: Add keyword trigger comment on every Reel within 30 min of posting. Example: 'Comment GUIDE and I'll send you the full breakdown'

optimal_windows_est.reason: TikTok early morning US is extremely high-reach. Algorithm rewards early posters.
US lunch break. Second-highest TikTok engagement window.
US prime time entertainment window. Longest watch sessions.

tiktok.cadence: 3 videos/day per account. 5 accounts = 15 TikToks/day total.
tiktok.us_targeting_note: TikTok serves by region. Post from US IP or use US-targeted account settings. If Moe is outside US, schedule posts via TikTok scheduler or third-party tool during US hours.

daily_total.note: This is maximum cadence. Start with 50% (18/day) and scale up as content library grows.

Tuesday.note: Peak engagement day — post strongest content

Friday.note: JUMU'AH — Islamic content gets highest reach on Fridays

Saturday.note: Reduced — audience outside, lower completion rates

Sunday.note: Reduced — use for testing new clip styles

special_windows.ramadan: 3× posting frequency — Islamic content gets 5–10× normal reach during Ramadan
special_windows.us_holidays: Black Friday, New Year, July 4 — reduce posting (ad competition lowers organic reach)
special_windows.trending_hijack: When a topic trends in US, drop a relevant clip within 2 hours — massive reach multiplier

tools.time_conversion: Use worldtimebuddy.com to convert local time to EST posting windows
